mapper.update: UPDATE medir_config SET team_id = #{teamId}, config_key = #{configKey}, config_value = #{configValue}, value_type = #{valueType}, category = #{category}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, enabled = #{enabled} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM medir_config ORDER BY team_id, sort_order, id
SELECT * FROM medir_config WHERE team_id = #{teamId} ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT * FROM medir_config WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND config_key = #{configKey}
